guardrails: Use this companion entrypoint only from a controlled local environment.
Keep the scheduled governance workflow read-only.
Let the Codex loop land only the current next_slice and then re-evaluate state.
The ignition wrapper allows existing dirty worktree promotion takeover by default; set DATAPULSE_CODEX_ALLOW_EXISTING_DIRTY_WORKTREE=0 to keep manual review before repo_landed.
Do not invoke business entrypoints from the auto-continuation workflow.
Do not mutate release assets or tags from the auto-continuation workflow.
Keep runtime blockers machine-visible and stop instead of hand-waving around them.
